title: Verify private analytical policy validation
preconditions: An ignored owner-only manifest covers all required evidence shapes, expected states, false-severity cases, and disclosure canaries; missing and stale variants are available.
steps: Validate candidate active and deferred policies, omit each required shape, inject false high severity, remove formula or baseline evidence, change fingerprints, remove the corpus, and scan all outputs and tracked state.
expected: Every case is accounted for; unsafe candidates and changed policies are blocked; unchanged released policies remain usable without the corpus; only fingerprints and aggregate outcomes persist.
